name: IdsDmMbrshDmClsPlnExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_cls_pln AS ( SELECT CP.CLS_PLN_SK, COALESCE(SRCCD.TRGT_CD, 'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, CP.CLS_PLN_ID, CP.CLS_PLN_METRO_RURAL_CD_SK, CP.BUY_UP_IN, CP.CLS_PLN_DESC, CP.PCMH_IN FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLS_PLN AS CP LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG AS SRCCD ON CP.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = SRCCD.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE CP.CLS_PLN_SK NOT IN (0, 1) ), cte_final AS ( SELECT cte_cls_pln.SRC_SYS_CD, cte_cls_pln.CLS_PLN_ID, cte_cls_pln.BUY_UP_IN AS CLS_PLN_BUY_UP_IN, cte_cls_pln.CLS_PLN_DESC, CASE WHEN ref.TRGT_CD IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(ref.TRGT_CD)) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE ref.TRGT_CD END AS CLS_PLN_METRO_RURAL_CD, CASE WHEN ref.TRGT_CD_NM IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(ref.TRGT_CD_NM)) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE ref.TRGT_CD_NM END AS CLS_PLN_METRO_RURAL_NM, cte_cls_pln.PCMH_IN AS CLS_PLN_PCMH_IN, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO FROM cte_cls_pln LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG AS ref ON cte_cls_pln.CLS_PLN_METRO_RURAL_CD_SK = ref.CD_MPPNG_SK ) SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, CLS_PLN_ID, CLS_PLN_BUY_UP_IN, CLS_PLN_DESC, CLS_PLN_METRO_RURAL_CD, CLS_PLN_METRO_RURAL_NM, CLS_PLN_PCMH_IN, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO FROM cte_final

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2012 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY        
                           
PROCESSING:
                    Extracts from IDS CLS_PLN and loads the DataMart table MBRSH_DM_CLS_PLN

Data into DM table MBRSH_DM_CLS_PLN
